site.name: Casa Karaya
site.heroSubtitle: I put this guide together to help you settle in quickly and feel at home. Everything important is here, from the basics on arrival to the little details that make the stay easier.
site.heroNote: Casa Karaya is meant to feel warm, easy, and welcoming from the moment you arrive.
site.footerNote: I hope this place feels easy to settle into. If anything is unclear or you need something, please reach out.

quickFacts.label: Check-in
quickFacts.detail: I will share the exact arrival details before check-in so getting in feels easy.

quickFacts.label: Check-out
quickFacts.detail: Before heading out, please leave the keys on the kitchen counter and send me a quick note.

quickFacts.label: Parking
quickFacts.detail: If parking is included for your stay, please use the assigned space and keep the gate control with you.

quickFacts.label: Host
quickFacts.detail: This is the best number for anything you need during your stay.

areas.name: Living Room
areas.summary: This is the heart of the apartment and the easiest place to settle in when you arrive.
instructions: You will usually find the TV remote on the media console.
If you are running the A/C, please keep the balcony doors closed so the room stays cool.
Extra throw blankets are in the sideboard if you want to get comfortable.
The main room lights are on a dimmer, so feel free to adjust them to whatever feels right.

areas.name: Primary Bedroom
areas.summary: I like this room to feel calm and restful, especially if you are arriving after a long day.
instructions: The A/C remote is usually on the right nightstand.
Please use the curtain pull gently so the blackout curtains do not tangle.
Extra pillows and blankets are in the closet if you want them.
If you can, please keep luggage off the bedding.

areas.name: Guest Bedroom
areas.summary: This room is set up to feel simple, comfortable, and ready for extra guests.
instructions: There are closet hangers available for shorter or longer stays.
Fresh towels are placed on the bed before arrival.
If you need an extra set of linens, just let me know.

areas.name: Kitchen
areas.summary: The kitchen is set up for easy breakfasts, simple meals, and everyday use.
instructions: Salt, pepper, oil, and a few basic seasonings are in the upper cabinet.
Trash is under the sink and recycling is in the blue bin.
Please give the counters and stovetop a quick wipe after cooking.
The filtered water pitcher is in the refrigerator.

areas.name: Balcony
areas.summary: The balcony is one of my favorite spots, especially if you want a little air or a quieter moment.
instructions: Please do not leave cushions outside if heavy rain is coming through.
The balcony is also non-smoking.
Please avoid placing anything on the railing.

appliances.name: Air Conditioning
appliances.summary: The A/C is easy to use once you have the remote, and it cools the apartment quickly.
instructions: Press Power to turn the unit on or off.
I usually recommend 23 to 25 C for a comfortable setting.
If you will be out for a while, please turn it off before leaving.
Keep windows and balcony doors closed while it is running.

appliances.name: Water Heater
appliances.summary: If you want a hot shower, just give the heater a little time before using it.
instructions: Switch the heater on at the panel before showering.
Give it about 10 to 15 minutes to warm up.
When you are done, please switch it off again.

appliances.name: Washer and Dryer
appliances.summary: The washer and dryer are there for lighter guest loads during your stay.
instructions: One detergent pod per load is usually enough.
Cold water is best for most fabrics.
Please clean the dryer lint trap before each cycle.
Leave the washer door slightly open after you finish.

appliances.name: Coffee Machine
appliances.summary: If you want an easy coffee at home, everything you need should be right there.
instructions: Fill the rear reservoir with fresh water.
Insert a pod and choose the cup size you want.
Discard the used pod after brewing.
You will find extra pods in the cabinet above the machine.

appliances.name: Smart TV
appliances.summary: The living room TV is ready for streaming if you want to unwind at home.
instructions: Use the Home button on the Samsung remote to get started.
Feel free to log into your own streaming accounts during your stay.
Before checkout, please log out of any personal accounts.

houseRules.title: No Smoking
houseRules.description: Please keep both the apartment and the balcony smoke-free.

houseRules.title: Respect Quiet Hours
houseRules.description: Please keep things quiet from 10 PM to 8 AM out of respect for the neighbors.

houseRules.title: A/C Off When Away
houseRules.description: If you are heading out for a while, please turn the A/C off before leaving.

houseRules.title: Care for Furnishings
houseRules.description: Please treat the home, the artwork, and the appliances with care, the way you would in a friend's place.

localTips.title: Restaurants Nearby
items: Meson D'Bari is a good choice if you want Dominican comfort food.
Segafredo is easy for coffee or a light breakfast.
Jalao is a nice option if you want something a little more lively for dinner.

localTips.title: Essentials
items: Farmacia Carol is nearby if you need a quick pharmacy run.
Nacional is usually the easiest grocery option.
Uber is generally the simplest way to get around.

contacts.label: Host
contacts.name: Casa Karaya Host
contacts.description: Reach out here first for anything at all in the apartment, check-in questions, or if something does not feel right.

contacts.label: Building
contacts.name: Concierge and Security
contacts.description: Use this for lobby access, building-related issues, or after-hours help downstairs.

contacts.label: Emergency
contacts.name: National Emergency Services
contacts.description: For police, fire, or ambulance emergencies.
